channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran denies plans for inspectors to visit nuclear sites
item.description: Iran dismissed Vice President JD Vance's suggestion that U.N. inspectors will soon return to its damaged nuclear facilities.

item.title: Acting intelligence chief begins agency firings, sources say
item.description: President Trump's acting director of national intelligence has started terminating staff at the agency, according to sources.

item.title: New York's 2026 primaries are here. Who is on the ballot?
item.description: New York voters will decide nominees in several high-profile races, including one featuring a Kennedy family member among Democrats.

item.title: WATCH: 81-year-old couple renew wedding vows at Taco Bell
item.description: Mickey and Jo Ann Muhlestein renewed their wedding vows and celebrated 60 years of marriage at their favorite lunch spot.
